goal: Define extraction boundaries for a unified source of truth across armenian-corpus-core, armenian-linguistics-core, and platform adapters.
boundary_principles: Core packages keep pure domain logic, schemas, and use cases with no hardcoded project paths.
Adapters own network clients, persistence engines, YAML loading, CLI entry points, and environment wiring.
All cross-package integration should happen through ports and DTOs, not direct imports of app internals.
Move modules only when they can be imported without requiring local config/settings.yaml side effects.

extract_domain_from_existing_modules.extract: logical entity schema definitions and canonical field contracts

extract_domain_from_existing_modules.keep_local: current SQLite and Mongo concrete writers

extract_domain_from_existing_modules.extract: dialect scoring rules, marker weights, and scoring engine
extract_domain_from_existing_modules.keep_local: author database lookup, config loading, and CLI/runtime glue

extract_domain_from_existing_modules.extract: pure token validation and dialect-safe filtering rules
extract_domain_from_existing_modules.keep_local: filesystem loading and project threshold settings

extract_domain_from_existing_modules.extract: quality-check rule set and result model
extract_domain_from_existing_modules.keep_local: I/O orchestration and report file writes

extract_domain_from_existing_modules.extract: vocabulary aggregation logic from text iterables
extract_domain_from_existing_modules.keep_local: directory walk, cache paths, and command entrypoint

lousardzag_expected_adapter_surface: Phonetics inventory provider adapter (maps lousardzag phoneme source to linguistics-core interfaces)
Transliteration and orthography adapter (maps lousardzag normalizer conventions to linguistics-core token model)
Lexicon and pronunciation lookup adapter (bridges lousardzag dictionary assets into corpus-core metadata contracts)
Optional TTS bias-correction adapter layered above linguistics-core normalization

phase_1_add_alias_packages: Add local compatibility namespaces that re-export new core symbols before moving callers.
phase_2_rewrite_internal_imports: Rewrite direct imports in moved modules to package-local imports in each core package.
Rewrite call sites from src.* to core package imports in small batches per subsystem.
Block new src-to-src imports for extracted modules with lint rule or CI check.
phase_3_remove_aliases: After two green CI cycles with no old-import usage, remove alias shims.
Fail CI on legacy import patterns via regex checks.

risk_list.risk: Config path coupling: many modules read config/settings.yaml directly.
risk_list.impact: Moved code fails outside WesternArmenianLLM layout.
risk_list.mitigation: Inject config objects at adapter boundary; remove direct file reads from core.

risk_list.risk: Persistence coupling: corpus logic currently depends on SQLite/Mongo classes.
risk_list.impact: Core packages become storage-specific and hard to share with lousardzag.
risk_list.mitigation: Define storage ports in corpus-core and keep DB engines in local adapters.

risk_list.risk: Import churn can break scripts that use python -m src.* entry points.
risk_list.mitigation: Keep compatibility shims and preserve existing CLI wrappers until cutover complete.

risk_list.risk: Language filter mixes linguistic scoring with project-specific author datasets.
risk_list.impact: False assumptions in core package and harder unit testing.
risk_list.mitigation: Split scoring engine from author-data adapters and add explicit input contracts.

risk_list.risk: Research pipeline currently assumes local data folder conventions.
risk_list.impact: Core package cannot run in other repos without path hacks.
risk_list.mitigation: Use iterable/document providers in core and keep path traversal in adapters.

risk_list.risk: Concurrent extraction from two repos can diverge naming conventions.
risk_list.impact: Adapter mismatch and duplicate DTO definitions.
risk_list.mitigation: Freeze interface names in a shared contract document before first move.
